items.docs: Returns available categories, tags, difficulties, question types, and aggregate stats. No API key required — this is a discovery endpoint.

Returns the full Topic → Category hierarchy with quiz counts and popular tags per category. Use the returned category `id` as the `categoryId` when creating quizzes. No API key required — this is a discovery endpoint.

params.name: topic
params.description: Free-text search in title, description, and tags

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order: popular (plays desc), newest (created desc), or title (alphabetical asc)

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of published, approved quizzes (plus your own). Supports filtering by category, difficulty, tags, and free-text topic search.

Create a new quiz. Requires a Starter or Pro plan (admins are exempt). Quiz creation limits are enforced per plan. Admins can set `featured: true` to display the quiz in the Practice section immediately. Non-admin users can add `featured` in the body but it will be silently ignored.
Returns full details for a single quiz including all questions and answers. Only published quizzes that are approved or owned by the API key holder are returned.

params.name: quiz_id
params.description: If provided, returns questions for this quiz (Mode 1). If omitted, enters browse mode (Mode 2).

params.name: include_answers
params.description: Set to "true" to include answers (Mode 1 only). In browse mode, answers are always included.

params.name: category
params.description: Filter by quiz category. Supports comma-separated values for multiple categories (case-insensitive). Browse mode only.

params.name: difficulty
params.description: Filter by difficulty. Supports comma-separated values (case-insensitive). Browse mode only.

params.name: type
params.description: Filter by question type. Supports comma-separated values. Browse mode only.

params.name: tags
params.description: Comma-separated tags to match (browse mode only)

params.name: limit
params.description: Max questions to return per page in browse mode (1–50)

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of questions to skip for pagination (browse mode only)

params.name: random
params.description: Set to "true" to shuffle the returned questions randomly (browse mode only)

items.docs: Two modes: (1) Pass `quiz_id` to get ordered questions for a specific quiz. (2) Omit `quiz_id` to browse questions across all published quizzes with pagination, filtering, and optional randomization. Only approved quizzes and your own quizzes are included.

params.name: id
params.description: The quiz ID to add questions to

items.docs: Import multiple questions into an existing quiz at once. Validates all questions before inserting — if any fail validation, the entire batch is rejected. Questions are appended after existing questions. **Requires a paid plan (Starter or Pro) or admin role.**
